name: genexus_query
description: Primary discovery tool. Start here to find objects and references before read/edit. Supports prefixes like 'usedby:Name', 'type:Type', 'description:Text', 'parent:FolderName', and 'parentPath:"Module/Folder"'. For token efficiency set limit and (optionally) fields/axiCompact. If it returns 'Index missing', run genexus_lifecycle(action='index') first.

typeFilter.description: Optional server-side type filter applied before ranking, such as 'Folder' or 'Module'.

domainFilter.description: Optional business domain filter applied before ranking.

name: genexus_list_objects
description: Hierarchical object listing for navigation and pagination. Prefer parentPath over parent for disambiguation, and always pass limit/offset. Returns {count, total, offset, hasMore, nextOffset?, results[]}: feed `nextOffset` into the next call and stop when `hasMore` is false. Supports optional fields and axiCompact in MCP arguments.

filter.description: Optional partial name or comma-separated type filter.

parentPath.description: Canonical hierarchical parent path, for example 'ModuloA/Procs'.

typeFilter.description: Optional server-side type filter applied before returning results.

name: genexus_read
description: Reads source/metadata parts. Use after discovery (query/list) and keep reads paginated with offset/limit. Supports parts like Source, Rules, Events, Layout, WebForm, PatternInstance, and PatternVirtual. Use 'name' for a single object, or 'targets' (plural) for batch reads. The two are mutually exclusive.

name.description: Single object name. Mutually exclusive with 'targets'.

targets.description: Plural form: list of object names for batch read. Mutually exclusive with 'name'.

part.description: Part (for example Source, Rules, Events, Layout, WebForm, PatternInstance).

type.description: Optional object type (e.g., 'Procedure', 'File') to resolve name collisions.

name: genexus_edit
description: Mutation tool for source/metadata. Prefer mode='patch' with dryRun=true + expectedCount before applying changes. Use mode='full' only for intentional full overwrite. Use mode='ops' to apply a list of structural semantic operations (set_attribute, add_attribute, remove_attribute, add_rule, remove_rule, set_property) against a single part XML. Use 'name' for a single edit, or 'targets' (plural) for batch edits across one or many objects. The two are mutually exclusive.

part.description: Part name (for example Source, Rules, Layout, WebForm, PatternInstance).

ops.description: For mode='ops': list of semantic operations applied to the resolved part XML.

op.description: Operation name (set_attribute, add_attribute, remove_attribute, add_rule, remove_rule, set_property).

context.description: For patch mode: The exact text (old_string) to replace.

operation.description: For patch mode: Operation to perform.

expectedCount.description: For patch mode: expected number of matching context blocks (default 1).

dryRun.description: For patch mode: validates and computes patch result without persisting changes.

verifyRollback.description: For patch mode: applies the patch, verifies persisted content, then automatically restores the original content and verifies the rollback.

expectedCount.description: For patch mode: expected number of matching context blocks.

dryRun.description: For patch mode: validates patch without persisting.

verifyRollback.description: For patch mode: applies change, verifies persistence, and automatically rolls back to original content.

targets.description: Plural form: list of edit requests across one or many objects. Mutually exclusive with 'name'.

type.description: Optional object type to resolve name collisions.

name: genexus_inspect
description: Comprehensive object inspection. Returns metadata, variables, structure, and signature in a single call.

include.description: Specific parts to include (defaults to all).

type.description: Optional object type to resolve name collisions.

name: genexus_analyze
description: Deep semantic and structural analysis using various specialized engines.

mode.description: The type of analysis to perform.

name: genexus_summarize
description: Creates a semantically compressed summary of a GeneXus object to save tokens.

name: genexus_inject_context
description: Automates dependency discovery. Injects SDT structures and Procedure signatures of called objects into context.

recursive.description: Whether to discover dependencies of dependencies (default: false).

name: genexus_lifecycle
description: Lifecycle and long-running operation control. Use for build/validate/index and for polling timed-out operations via action='status' or action='result' with target='op:<operationId>'.

action.description: Lifecycle action. 'validate-kb' scans PatternInstance conditions for unknown attribute references. 'snapshots-list'/'snapshots-restore' manage pre-write pattern snapshots.

target.description: Object or environment name, taskId for build status, or op:<operationId> for gateway operation tracking.

code.description: For validation: the code to check.

limit.description: For validate-kb: max objects to scan (0 = unlimited).

snapshotPath.description: For snapshots-restore: full path returned by snapshots-list.

name: genexus_open_kb
description: Opens an existing GeneXus Knowledge Base for the active MCP session.

path.description: Absolute path to the GeneXus Knowledge Base directory.

name: genexus_forge
description: Generation of new code and structures from templates or translations.

name: genexus_test
description: Execution of native GeneXus tests (GXtest).

name: genexus_get_sql
description: Returns the SQL DDL (CREATE TABLE) for a specific Transaction or Table object.

name.description: The name of the Transaction or Table.

name: genexus_create_object
description: Creates a new GeneXus object in the active Knowledge Base.

type.description: Object type such as Procedure, Transaction, WebPanel, SDT, or DataProvider.

name: genexus_export_object
description: Exports a GeneXus object part to a text file on disk.

outputPath.description: Absolute or relative output file path.

part.description: Part to export, such as Source, Rules, Events, Structure, Layout, WebForm, or PatternInstance.

type.description: Optional object type to resolve name collisions.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing file.

name: genexus_import_object
description: Imports a text file from disk into a GeneXus object part.

inputPath.description: Absolute or relative input file path.

part.description: Part to import into, such as Source, Rules, Events, Structure, Layout, WebForm, or PatternInstance.

type.description: Optional object type to resolve name collisions.

name: genexus_refactor
description: Runs supported GeneXus refactor operations such as renaming, procedure extraction, and WorkWithPlus condition setting.

objectName.description: Object name that owns the refactor operation. Required for variable rename and extraction.

code.description: Code block to extract for ExtractProcedure.

value.description: For WWPSetCondition: new conditions string (e.g., 'DocTipOri = 24;'). Empty clears.

name: genexus_add_variable
description: Adds a variable to the Variables part of a GeneXus object.

name: genexus_explain_code
description: Runs code explanation or auto-fix style analysis for a GeneXus object snippet.

code.description: Code snippet or serialized analysis payload.

name: genexus_format
description: Formats a GeneXus code snippet using the worker formatting rules.

name: genexus_properties
description: Reads or updates GeneXus object properties.

control.description: Optional control name for UI properties.

name: genexus_asset
description: Finds, reads, or writes binary assets stored inside the active Knowledge Base, including report templates such as .xlsx files.

path.description: Relative or absolute path inside the KB for read/write operations.

includeContent.description: For read operations, include Base64 file content. Defaults to false so large binary payloads do not flood the MCP context.

maxBytes.description: For read operations with includeContent=true, maximum file size allowed before the worker returns a size error.

pattern.description: File glob pattern for find operations, for example '*.xlsx'.

relativeRoot.description: Optional relative folder inside the KB to scope find operations.

limit.description: Maximum number of files returned by find.

contentBase64.description: Base64-encoded asset content for write operations.

name: genexus_history
description: Lists, reads, saves, or restores GeneXus object history snapshots.

name: genexus_structure
description: Reads or updates visual and logical structure information for GeneXus objects.

name: genexus_layout
description: Native SDK layout/WebForm operations. Use get_tree for deterministic node discovery, set_property for direct visual metadata updates, inspect_surface for structural introspection, and scan_mutators for deep reflective discovery of persistent mutation endpoints.

target.description: Object name alias for backward compatibility with older prompts/clients.

propertyName.description: Visual property to mutate (for example Caption, Class, Visible, X, Y, Width, Height, ForeColor, BackColor, BorderColor).

value.description: New value for set_property. For colors, prefer palette names (Black, Blue, Red, Transparent) or RGB token format (e.g. 0; 0; 0|).

currentName.description: Current print block name for rename_printblock.

newName.description: New print block name for rename_printblock.

name: genexus_doc
description: Knowledge extraction and documentation generation.
